description_long: This is a dark, ornate dagger with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade features a series of circular inlays or rivets along its length, adding both structural and decorative elements. The hilt is elaborate, with a circular cutout just above the guard and a handle that appears textured for grip, ending in a pointed pommel. The guard is minimal but present, providing a slight barrier between the blade and handle. The overall design suggests a ceremonial or fantasy-inspired weapon, with a focus on both aesthetics and functionality. The metallic surface has a matte, slightly reflective finish, and the object appears solid and robust.
description: A dark, ornate dagger with a straight, double-edged blade, circular inlays, and a decorative, textured handle with a pointed pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the blade, circular inlays, and the detailed handle with its cutout and pointed pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail except the overall silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, inlays, and handle details from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_design: textured, straight handle with a circular cutout and pointed pommel
attribute_ornamentation: circular inlays on blade, decorative handle cutout
